ticket.title: Auth session persistence: SRP sessions don't survive a browser reload
ticket.description: Cognito SRP/OAuth auth works end-to-end, but sessions don't survive a full page reload or restart (tokens are in-memory). Persist sessions via a server-side session store so the session cookie resolves on reload.
